meaning: n.属于蒙古人种的人,蒙古语,[医]先头愚型患者adj.蒙古人的,蒙古语的,[医]先头愚型症的
examples: Tourists can also some pure Mongolian entertainment on the vast grassland, such as watching horse racing, wrestling performances, archery and hunting.
He is a 37-year-old man with the distinct Mongolian features characteristic of the borderlands, and he wears a brown tunic, a turban, and a tentative smile.
Voicing and palatalization as well as aspiration are all distinctive in Mongolian.
Last April, a Mongolian dog fight had banner advertisements of Heineken plastered throughout the arena.
Friedland claims he wants to develop the Mongolian mine himself, or with a partner.
